Citation

Source: DESCRIPTION

Patikas N, Yao H, Korsunsky I, Hemberg M, Millard N, Fan J, Slowikowski K, Raychaudhuri S (2026). harmony: Fast, Sensitive, and Accurate Integration of Single Cell Data. R package version 2.0.0, https://github.com/immunogenomics/harmony. 

@Manual{,
  title = {harmony: Fast, Sensitive, and Accurate Integration of Single Cell Data},
  author = {Nikolaos Patikas and Hongcheng Yao and Ilya Korsunsky and Martin Hemberg and Nghia Millard and Jean Fan and Kamil Slowikowski and Soumya Raychaudhuri},
  year = {2026},

  url = {https://github.com/immunogenomics/harmony},
}

Developed by Nikolaos Patikas, Hongcheng Yao, Ilya Korsunsky, Martin Hemberg, Nghia Millard, Jean Fan, Kamil Slowikowski, Soumya Raychaudhuri.
